title: ADULT THERAPY SERVICES - 211info
text: HILLSIDE CENTER ADULT THERAPY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health assessments, psychiatric treatment, group and individual therapy, gambling and substance use disorder treatment from counselors, social workers, and clinical psychologists. Offers case management, supportive employment services, peer support, and adult skills training for daily living with a focus on budgeting, meal prep, and using public transit. Also provides information and referrals to community resources. 1545 Harbeck Road Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (541) 476-2373 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 476-2373 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Participants must complete an intake and screening for services. FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP and discounted and sliding-scale fees are available. Accepts private insurance on a case-by-case basis. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:15pm, Friday 8am-4pm Services: Case/Care Management * Mental Health Issues Gambling Disorder Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Life Skills Education Mental Health Evaluation Specialized Information and Referral * Mental Health Issues Substance Use Disorder Counseling Vocational Rehabilitation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HILLSIDE CENTER
